title: Post-synthesis simulation, Xilinx
body:
[This answer](http://stackoverflow.com/a/35939285/2698019) is very promising. However, I need the same thing for Xilinx FPGAs. So I tried this:
```bash
yosys -p 'synth_xilinx -top test; write_blif test.blif' test.v
yosys -o test_syn.v test.blif
iverilog -o test_post -D POST_SYNTHESIS test_tb.v test_syn.v \
                        `yosys-config --datdir/xilinx/cells_sim.v`
./test_post
```

But I am not getting the right output:
```
xxxx
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
0000
```

Looking at the ``test_syn.v`` file, it seems like LUTs are not initialized.
code_blocks:
yosys -p 'synth_xilinx -top test; write_blif test.blif' test.v
yosys -o test_syn.v test.blif
iverilog -o test_post -D POST_SYNTHESIS test_tb.v test_syn.v \
                        `yosys-config --datdir/xilinx/cells_sim.v`
./test_post
